title: Delay in refuse removal
description: GEORGE NEWS - Residents are advised that...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Residents are advised that refuse collection services are experiencing delays this afternoon due to vehicle breakdowns, resulting in only 11 refuse compactors being operational.


> The refuse collection teams are continuing to work to ensure that today’s scheduled collections are completed as far as possible.


"We apologise for the inconvenience caused and thank residents for their patience and understanding."

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
